8.ai_generated_sql:
SELECT YEAR(`pay_time`) AS `年份`, 
       CASE 
           WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, `users`.`register_time`, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 18 AND 25 THEN '18-25'
           WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, `users`.`register_time`, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 26 AND 35 THEN '26-35'
           WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, `users`.`register_time`, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 36 AND 45 THEN '36-45'
           WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, `users`.`register_time`, CURDATE()) > 45 THEN '45+'
           ELSE '其他' 
       END AS `年龄段`,
       SUM(`payments`.`amount`) AS `支付金额` 
  FROM `payments` 
  LEFT JOIN `orders` ON `payments`.`order_id` = `orders`.`order_id` 
  LEFT JOIN `users` ON `orders`.`user_id` = `users`.`user_id` 
 WHERE CASE 
           WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, `users`.`register_time`, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 18 AND 25 THEN '18-25'
           WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, `users`.`register_time`, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 26 AND 35 THEN '26-35'
           WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, `users`.`register_time`, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 36 AND 45 THEN '36-45'
           WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, `users`.`register_time`, CURDATE()) > 45 THEN '45+'
       END IN ('18-25', '26-35', '36-45', '45+') 
 GROUP BY YEAR(`pay_time`), 
       CASE 
           WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, `users`.`register_time`, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 18 AND 25 THEN '18-25'
           WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, `users`.`register_time`, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 26 AND 35 THEN '26-35'
           WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, `users`.`register_time`, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 36 AND 45 THEN '36-45'
           WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, `users`.`register_time`, CURDATE()) > 45 THEN '45+'
       END 
 ORDER BY `年份` DESC, `年龄段`
8.ai_explanation: 通过payments表关联orders和users表，根据用户注册时间计算年龄分组，按年份和年龄段统计支付金额总和。使用TIMESTAMPDIFF计算年龄，通过CASE WHEN划分年龄段，最终按年份和年龄段分组聚合。

12.ai_generated_sql: SELECT `carrier` AS '快递公司', SUM(CASE WHEN `status` = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '待处理', SUM(CASE WHEN `status` = 'picked_up' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '已取件', SUM(CASE WHEN `status` = 'in_transit' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '运输中', SUM(CASE WHEN `status` = 'delivered' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '已签收', SUM(CASE WHEN `status` = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '失败', SUM(CASE WHEN `status` = 'returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '已退回' FROM `shipments` GROUP BY `carrier`
12.ai_explanation: 按快递公司统计各状态类型的物流单数量，使用条件聚合将状态转换为列展示

13.ai_generated_sql:
SELECT `date_month` AS `月份`, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN `order_status` = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `待支付数量`, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN `order_status` = 'paid' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `已支付数量`, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN `order_status` = 'shipped' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `已发货数量`, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN `order_status` = 'received' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `已收货数量`, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN `order_status` = 'refunding' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `退款中数量`, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN `order_status` = 'refunded' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `已退款数量` 
FROM (
    SELECT DATE_FORMAT(`create_time`, '%Y-%m') AS `date_month`, `order_status` 
    FROM `orders` 
    WHERE `order_status` != 'cancelled' 
) AS `monthly_orders` 
GROUP BY `date_month` 
ORDER BY `date_month`;
13.ai_explanation: 通过子查询先按月份和订单状态分组，外层使用条件聚合将订单状态行转列。使用DATE_FORMAT提取月份，SUM(CASE WHEN...)实现行转列，WHERE条件排除已取消订单，最终按月份排序展示各状态订单数量。

14.ai_generated_sql:
SELECT '平均描述相符评分' AS `评分类型`, AVG(`description_score`) AS `评分值` FROM `store_ratings` 
UNION ALL
SELECT '平均服务态度评分', AVG(`service_score`) FROM `store_ratings`
UNION ALL
SELECT '平均物流服务评分', AVG(`logistics_score`) FROM `store_ratings`
14.ai_explanation: 通过UNION ALL将三个DSR评分指标转换为行格式展示，每个评分类型单独一行显示其平均值。使用中文别名'评分类型'和'评分值'作为结果列名，符合列转行的业务需求。

15.ai_explanation: 从payments表中按支付方式和支付状态分组，统计成功和失败的支付笔数。使用WHERE过滤掉待支付状态，确保只统计成功和失败两种状态，结果按支付方式和状态组合展示为行

19.ai_generated_sql: SELECT `t`.`shipment_id` AS `物流单ID`, `t`.`track_id` AS `物流轨迹数量`, `t`.`location` AS `当前位置`, `t`.`status` AS `轨迹状态`, `t`.`track_time` AS `轨迹时间` FROM (SELECT `shipment_tracks`.`shipment_id`, `shipment_tracks`.`track_id`, `shipment_tracks`.`location`, `shipment_tracks`.`status`, `shipment_tracks`.`track_time`, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY `shipment_tracks`.`shipment_id` ORDER BY `shipment_tracks`.`track_time` DESC, `shipment_tracks`.`track_id` DESC) AS `rn` FROM `shipment_tracks`) `t` WHERE `t`.`rn` = 1

28.ai_generated_sql: SELECT `month` AS `月份`, `current_orders` AS `当月订单数`, LAG(`current_orders`, 1) OVER(ORDER BY `month`) AS `上月订单数`, ROUND((`current_orders` - LAG(`current_orders`, 1) OVER(ORDER BY `month`)) / LAG(`current_orders`, 1) OVER(ORDER BY `month`) * 100, 2) AS `环比变化(%)` FROM (SELECT DATE_FORMAT(`create_time`, '%Y-%m') AS `month`, COUNT(*) AS `current_orders` FROM `orders` WHERE `order_status` != 'cancelled' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(`create_time`, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY `month`) AS monthly_orders
28.ai_explanation: 通过子查询先按月份统计订单数量，外层查询使用LAG窗口函数计算环比变化。1. 子查询过滤取消订单并按月份聚合 2. 主查询计算环比变化百分比 3. 结果包含月份/当月订单数/上月订单数/环比变化率

29.ai_generated_sql: SELECT `user_id` AS `用户ID`, `receive_time` AS `领券时间`, DATEDIFF(`receive_time`, LAG(`receive_time`, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY `user_id` ORDER BY `receive_time`)) AS `间隔天数` FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `user_id`, DATE(`receive_time`) AS `receive_time` FROM `user_coupons`) AS `tmp` WHERE LAG(`receive_time`, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY `user_id` ORDER BY `receive_time`) IS NOT NULL
29.ai_explanation: 通过user_coupons表获取用户领券记录，使用窗口函数LAG计算相邻两次领券的时间间隔。先按用户ID分组并按领券时间排序，通过DATEDIFF计算间隔天数。使用DISTINCT确保同一用户同一天领券只计算一次。

30.ai_generated_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_FORMAT(`orders`.`create_time`, '%Y-%m') AS `月份`, 
    SUM(`daily_users`.`新增用户数`) AS `当月新增用户数`, 
    LAG(SUM(`daily_users`.`新增用户数`), 1) OVER(ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(`orders`.`create_time`, '%Y-%m')) AS `上月用户数`, 
    (SUM(`daily_users`.`新增用户数`) - LAG(SUM(`daily_users`.`新增用户数`), 1) OVER(ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(`orders`.`create_time`, '%Y-%m'))) / LAG(SUM(`daily_users`.`新增用户数`), 1) OVER(ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(`orders`.`create_time`, '%Y-%m')) * 100 AS `环比增长%%` 
FROM (
    SELECT 
        DATE(`orders`.`create_time`) AS `日期`, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT `users`.`user_id`) AS `新增用户数` 
    FROM 
        `users` 
    INNER JOIN `orders` ON `users`.`user_id` = `orders`.`user_id` 
    GROUP BY 
        DATE(`orders`.`create_time`) 
) AS `daily_users` 
INNER JOIN `orders` ON DATE(`orders`.`create_time`) = `daily_users`.`日期` 
GROUP BY 
    DATE_FORMAT(`orders`.`create_time`, '%Y-%m') 
ORDER BY 
    `月份`;
30.ai_explanation:
1. 内层查询按天统计新增用户数（COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)）
2. 外层按月聚合每日新增用户数，使用LAG函数获取上月数据
3. 计算环比增长率（当前月-上月）/上月*100%
4. 通过orders表的create_time确定下单时间
